internal/config.notes: 60+ sub-packages of pure constants, types, compiled regexes. Domain-driven organization. 392 .go files, 76 doc.go files. Zero internal dependencies. embed/ has 3 tiers (cmd/flag/text with 130+ files). mcp/ has 12 sub-packages.

internal/assets.notes: Single go:embed FS. 14 typed reader sub-packages under read/*. tpl/ has Sprintf templates (539 lines, migration to text/template tracked). hooks/messages/ has 38 entries in registry.yaml. lookup.Init() pre-loads YAML maps.

internal/io.notes: Guarded file I/O with path validation, symlink protection, deny-list filtering. All file ops in codebase route through Safe* functions (enforced by TestNoRawFileIO). SafePost for HTTP with scheme/redirect limits. Enriched: SafeWriteFile has 69 direct callers — CRITICAL blast radius.

internal/format.notes: Display formatting: TimeAgo, Duration, Today, Truncate, Number, Bytes, Tokens.

internal/parse.notes: Shared text-to-typed-value conversion. Date() parses YYYY-MM-DD.

internal/sanitize.notes: Input mutation: Filename() converts to safe filename (lowercase, hyphenated, max 50 chars).

internal/validate.notes: Path validation and symlink detection. Boundary checking.

internal/inspect.notes: String predicates: SkipNewline, FindNewline, Contains, StartsWithCtxMarker.

internal/flagbind.notes: Cobra flag binding with YAML descriptions. 15+ variants (Bool, String, Int, Duration, Persistent, P shorthand). All descriptions from desc.Flag() lookup. Enforced by TestNoFlagBindOutsideFlagbind.

internal/exec.notes: 5 external command wrappers. All os/exec calls centralized here (enforced by audit). git/ most complex (Run, Root, RemoteURL, LogSince, DiffTreeHead). sysinfo/ darwin-only build tags.

internal/log.notes: Split into event (JSONL logging with rotation) and warn (stderr sink) to break import cycles (Decision 2026-03-31). Best-effort: never blocks operations.

internal/crypto.notes: AES-256-GCM with 12-byte nonce + 16-byte auth tag. Key management (generate, load, save with 0600 perms). Stdlib-only.

internal/sysinfo.notes: Platform-specific resource monitoring via build tags. Threshold alerting. Graceful degradation.

internal/rc.notes: sync.Once singleton. YAML config with env/CLI override chain. AllowOutsideCwd added. Defaults from config/runtime.

internal/entity.notes: Pure data types shared across CLI, MCP, write. Session, Message, Context, FileInfo, TaskBlock, JournalEntry, HookInput, EntryParams, BootstrapOutput. No I/O methods.

internal/entry.notes: Domain API for adding entries. ValidateAndWrite orchestrates validate + format + insert + index update. 3 callers: CLI add, MCP handler, watch.

internal/context.notes: 6 sub-packages. load.Do() reads all .md files with symlink rejection. token.Estimate() uses 4 chars/token. summary.Generate() per file type. validate.Initialized() checks required files. Enriched: load.Do() has 12+ non-test callers and participates in 100+ flows — CRITICAL hub.

internal/drift.notes: 7 drift checks: path refs, staleness, constitution, required files, age, entry counts, missing packages. Configurable thresholds via rc.

internal/index.notes: Markdown index tables between INDEX:START/END markers. EntryBlock splitting. Pipe escaping. Superseded detection.

internal/task.notes: Task checkbox parsing. Completed/Pending/SubTask with regex match groups. SubTask requires indent >= 2.

internal/tidy.notes: Context file maintenance. CompactResult type. Block parsing with indentation detection. #done: timestamp extraction for archival eligibility.

internal/trace.notes: Commit-to-context linking. Collect() gathers refs from pending, staged diffs, working state. FormatTrailer() for git commit messages. Deduplicate().

internal/journal/parser.notes: 4 registered parsers (Claude JSONL, Copilot, Copilot CLI, Markdown). Auto-detection via Matches(). 1MB buffer. Session matching by git remote/CWD. 26 Go files total.

internal/journal/state.notes: 5-stage pipeline: exported->enriched->normalized->fences_verified->locked. External .state.json. Atomic writes. CountUnenriched for nudges.

internal/memory.notes: Bridges Claude Code MEMORY.md into .context/. DiscoverPath via project slug. SelectContent with line budget. MergePublished writes outside .context/ (only package that does this). Enriched: DiscoverPath d=1:7, 4 modules, 7 flows — CRITICAL.

internal/notify.notes: Fire-and-forget webhooks. Encrypted URL storage. 5s timeout. Silent on errors. Event filtering.

internal/claude.notes: Thin wrapper for skill listing/content. Types: HookConfig, HookMatcher, Hook, PermissionsConfig, Settings.

internal/mcp.notes: 100% agent-agnostic JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdin/stdout. 11 tools, 9 resources, 5 prompts. Single-threaded main loop with background poller (5s mtime). Session governance (advisory, never blocking). Protocol 2024-11-05. Enriched: catalog.Init affects 20 flows; CheckGovernance clean 3-depth chain.

internal/cli.notes: 34 commands in 8 groups + 1 hidden. All follow cmd/root + core/ taxonomy. parent.Cmd() factory used by 10 grouping commands. New commands: change, config, dep, doctor, guide, mcp, memory, parent, pause, reindex, resume, setup, site, trace, why.

internal/bootstrap.notes: RootCmd with global flags. 34 commands in 9 groups (8 visible + 1 hidden). PersistentPreRunE guards: boundary, init check, AnnotationSkipInit for doctor/guide/setup.

internal/write.notes: 46 output formatting packages. Pattern: functions take *cobra.Command, nil-safe. Text from config/embed/text YAML. Some have JSON() variants. Clean one-directional relationship to CLI.

internal/err.notes: 35 error constructor packages. Pattern: functions return error with YAML text lookup. No sentinel errors (no var ErrX). One custom type: err/context/NotFoundError. Error wrapping with fmt.Errorf and desc.Text().

internal/audit.notes: AST-based codebase invariant tests. 40+ checks using go/ast and go/packages. Shared helpers. Quarantine/allowlist pattern for gradual enforcement.

internal/compliance.notes: File-level convention adherence tests. Mirrors lint scripts in Go test form.
